briefdescription.para: returns closest to base canonical quaternion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Matrix3< T > &m0, const Matrix3< T > &m1, T t)
memberdef.name: slerp

briefdescription.para: given t in [0,1] and two rotation matrices, interpolates them spherically and produces another rotation matrix

memberdef.argsstring: (const AffineXf3< T > &xf0, const AffineXf3< T > &xf1, T t, const Vector3< T > &p={})
memberdef.name: slerp

detaileddescription.para: given t in [0,1] and rigid transformations, interpolates them spherically and produces another rigid transformation; p is the only point that will have straight line movement during interpolation

briefdescription.para: given any matrix, returns a close rotation matrix

detaileddescription.para: given any affine transformation, returns a close rigid transformation; center point will be transformed to same point by both input and output transformations

memberdef.argsstring: (T a, T b, T c, T d) noexcept
memberdef.name: Quaternion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3< T > &from, const Vector3< T > &to) noexcept
memberdef.name: Quaternion

briefdescription.para: finds shorter arc rotation quaternion from one vector to another
returns imaginary part of the quaternion as a vector
returns angle of rotation encoded in this quaternion
returns axis of rotation encoded in this quaternion
returns quaternion representing the same rotation, using the opposite rotation direction and opposite angle
scales this quaternion to make its norm unit
computes conjugate quaternion, which for unit quaternions encodes the opposite rotation

detaileddescription.para: for unit quaternion returns the rotation of point p, which is faster to compute for single point; for multiple points it is faster to create matrix representation and apply it to the points

briefdescription.para: given t in [0,1], interpolates linearly two quaternions giving in general not-unit quaternion
given t in [0,1] and two unit quaternions, interpolates them spherically and produces another unit quaternion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Matrix3< T > &m0, const Matrix3< T > &m1, T t)
memberdef.name: slerp

briefdescription.para: given t in [0,1] and two rotation matrices, interpolates them spherically and produces another rotation matrix

memberdef.argsstring: (const AffineXf3< T > &xf0, const AffineXf3< T > &xf1, T t, const Vector3< T > &p={})
memberdef.name: slerp

detaileddescription.para: given t in [0,1] and rigid transformations, interpolates them spherically and produces another rigid transformation; p is the only point that will have straight line movement during interpolation
Represents a quaternion following the notations from https:/// en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quaternion
